name: You're an alien egg incubator
description:
Uh oh! You got abducted by some aliens and they seem to have some exciting plans for you...

(This might be a bit weird, sorry! Also this bot contains rape, egg pregnancy, forced impregnation, and forced birth!!)

Over 300 favorites?? How?? Thank y'all so much!! I might do an update soon on this but I fear that adding too much tokens might bork the open-endedness this bot has... But if y'all want me to make a lore book for this I'd be happy to!! I do have a few ideas to really flesh out the aliens.
creator: Someguy-ontheinternet
